Collaboration platform for tens of millions of users at thousands of organizations across the globe

Files Collaboration Nextcloud Files is a leading Files Collaboration Software that offers secure cloud storage and seamless file collaboration from anywhere, at any time. It ensures full control over your data with no third-party data leaks. Experience real-time collaboration and instant access to your files across any device with a modern and user-friendly web interface, desktop clients, and mobile apps. Nextcloud's Enterprise File Sync and Share feature provides direct, easy access to your data through web, mobile, and desktop sync clients. Choose between on-premises, cloud, or hybrid deployment options, and benefit from advanced encryption and external data storage capabilities for enhanced security and flexibility.

Files Collaboration

Software that offers secure cloud storage and seamless file collaboration from anywhere, at any time. It ensures full control over your data with no third-party data leaks. Experience real-time collaboration and instant access to your files across any device with a modern and user-friendly web interface, desktop clients, and mobile apps. Nextcloud's Enterprise File Sync and Share feature provides direct, easy access to your data through web, mobile, and desktop sync clients. Choose between on-premises, cloud, or hybrid deployment options, and benefit from advanced encryption and external data storage capabilities for enhanced security and flexibility.

Nextcloud Office

an essential tool for efficient file collaboration and document management.

Nextcloud Talk

enhances data protection and supports robust security measures for your organization.

Nextcloud Groupware

ensures a smooth user experience across all devices. Its straightforward deployment, configuration, and integration processes help reduce costs and minimize risk, while leveraging your existing IT investments. This all-in-one solution enables teams to collaborate more effectively and manage their tasks with greater ease, streamlining workflows and boosting overall productivity.

Cloud Collaboration Platform

Nextcloud is a versatile Files Collaboration Software designed to streamline organizational workflows by offering a range of essential features. It enables secure document sharing, email management, calendar coordination, and encrypted video chats, making it an all-in-one platform for business communication and collaboration. Key functionalities include workflow automation, user authentication, compliance management, remote access, and audit tracking. These features ensure that your team can efficiently manage tasks, maintain security and compliance, and access data from anywhere. By integrating these capabilities into a single platform, Nextcloud enhances productivity and simplifies administrative tasks, all while providing robust security measures to protect your sensitive information. Whether you are looking to improve collaboration or ensure regulatory compliance, Nextcloud offers a comprehensive solution tailored to meet the needs of modern organizations.
